reasoning: The Lean signature captures the informal claim precisely. The quantifier "∀ i : Icc 1 2009" covers exactly the terms after a_0. The integer `%` in Lean (`Int.emod`) with a c > 0 yields a value in [0, a c), matching the bracket comment "0 ≤ (b mod c) < c". No hypotheses are added or dropped.
